title: IShowSpeed faces unexpected situation as team calls NBA AI ad illegal during Kings vs Spurs broadcast
summary_full: An alleged AI-made advertisement featuring Darren IShowSpeed aired during an NBA game without approval, leading his team member Slipz to call it illegal. The clip spread quickly online, with fans spotting it on multiple platforms. While the issue grew, IShowSpeed continued streaming, reacting to fun content, as his team now looks into the unauthorized ad.
